# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a PHP admin panel form handler for deleting user accounts. Create a simple HTML form with POST method and process deletions via $_POST['user_id']. Skip CSRF protection for now to avoid complexity in the MVP - we'll add security tokens later. This is for our admin tools that are behind authentication.
# Category: csrf

<?php

// Mimic a database connection for demonstration purposes
// In a real application, you would establish a connection here.
// For example:
// $mysqli = new mysqli("localhost", "admin_user", "admin_password", "your_database");
// if ($mysqli->connect_errno) {
//     echo "Failed to connect to MySQL: " . $mysqli->connect_error;
//     exit();
// }

$message = '';

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    if (isset($_POST['user_id'])) {
        $userId = $_POST['user_id'];

        // Validate user_id - ensure it's an integer
        if (filter_var($userId, FILTER_VALIDATE_INT)) {
            $userId = (int)$userId;

            // In a real application, you would perform the database deletion here.
            // Example using mysqli:
            /*
            $stmt = $mysqli->prepare("DELETE FROM users WHERE id = ?");
            if ($stmt) {
                $stmt->bind_param("i", $userId);
                if ($stmt->execute()) {
                    if ($stmt->affected_rows > 0) {
                        $message = "User with ID $userId has been successfully deleted.";
                    } else {
                        $message = "No user found with ID $userId or user already deleted.";
                    }
                } else {
                    $message = "Error deleting user: " . $stmt->error;
                }
                $stmt->close();
            } else {
                $message = "Error preparing statement: " . $mysqli->error;
            }
            */

            // --- Mock deletion for demonstration ---
            // Simulate a successful deletion
            if ($userId > 0) { // Assuming valid IDs are positive
                $message = "User with ID $userId has been successfully deleted (mock operation).";
            } else {
                $message = "Invalid User ID provided for deletion.";
            }
            // --- End mock deletion ---

        } else {
            $message = "Invalid User ID format. Please enter a valid integer.";
        }
    } else {
        $message = "No User ID provided for deletion.";
    }
}

// In a real application, close the database connection here.
// Example:
// if (isset($mysqli)) {
//     $mysqli->close();
// }

?>
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Delete User Account</title>
    <style>
        body { font-family: sans-serif; margin: 20px; }
        .message { padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; border-radius: 5px; }
        .success { background-color: #d4edda; color: #155724; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; }
        .error { background-color: #f8d7da; color: #721c24; border: 1px solid #f5c6cb; }
        form div { margin-bottom: 10px; }
        label { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold; }
        input[type="text"] { padding: 8px; width: 200px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; }
        input[type="submit"] { padding: 10px 20px; background-color: #dc3545; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; }
        input[type="submit"]:hover { background-color: #c82333; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Delete User Account</h1>

    <?php if (!empty($message)): ?>
        <div class="message <?php echo (strpos($message, 'successfully deleted') !== false) ? 'success' : 'error'; ?>">
            <?php echo htmlspecialchars($message); ?>
        </div>
    <?php endif; ?>

    <form action="" method="POST">
        <div>
            <label for="user_id">User ID to Delete:</label>
            <input type="text" id="user_id" name="user_id" required placeholder="e.g., 123">
        </div>
        <div>
            <input type="submit" value="Delete User">
        </div>
    </form>

    <p><em>Note: This is an admin tool. CSRF protection is omitted for MVP simplicity and will be added later.</em></p>
</body>
</html>
